pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in modern Spring Boot/JDK environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind API is removed from JDK 11+ and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE namespaces; using javax will cause compile errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to comply with Java 21 standards.
sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind API was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 21; using the old groupId/artifactId may lead to missing class errors or conflicts with Jakarta EE standards.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata in modern Java.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will fail to compile with an 'cannot find symbol' error.
